allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Rewrite MCAN module from scratch using reference project pattern

- Full custom MCANConfig\(\): FD mode, bit timing, message RAM, filters \(IDs 5,6,7 -> FIFO 0 + reject-all\)
- Add MCAN GPIO pin muxing \(GPIO_0_MCANA_RX, GPIO_1_MCANA_TX\) - was missing, causing CAN not receiving
- Enable all MCAN interrupts via MCAN_INTR_MASK_ALL on Line 1 \(matching reference BU_S_BOARD11\)
- MCANIntrConfig\(\): registers MCANIntr1ISR on INT_MCANA_1
- ISR handles RF0N \(FIFO 0\), DRX \(dedicated buffer\), and error conditions
- Updated initMCAN\(\) to call MCANConfig\(\) + MCANIntrConfig\(\) + VoltageRx_init\(\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
